## 7010: The church as the people of God (id: 7010)

* 7020: church, the
* 7030: unity
* **Associated Articles:** 7020: church, the (ID: `7020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7030: unity (ID: `7030@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 7020: church, the (id: 7020)

The community of faithful believers, of whom Jesus Christ is the head, called out from the world to serve God down the ages. Scripture emphasises that the church is the body of Christ whose members are intended to be filled with the Holy Spirit. Scriptural understanding of the church is corporate, rather than solitary or individual.

* **Associated Articles:** 7021: church, OT anticipations of (ID: `7021@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7022: church, and Jesus Christ (ID: `7022@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7023: church, and Holy Spirit (ID: `7023@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7024: church, nature and foundations of (ID: `7024@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7025: church, unity and fellowship of (ID: `7025@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7026: church, leadership of (ID: `7026@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7027: church, purpose and mission of (ID: `7027@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7028: church, life of (ID: `7028@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 7021: church, OT anticipations of (id: 7021)

As the people of God, the Christian church is continuous with Israel. The OT provides important anticipations of the church.

OT terms for the people of God
------------------------------

### The descendants of Abraham

[2CH 20:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:7); ; [ISA 41:8–41:9](https://ref.ly/Isa41:8-Isa41:9); ; [ROM 4:16](https://ref.ly/Rom4:16); ; [GAL 3:7](https://ref.ly/Gal3:7) *“children of Abraham” in the NT refers to those who, like Abraham, put their faith in God*

### The saints

The term for `saints'' means`set apart for God'', \`\`made holy'', and is the most frequently used NT term for Christians: [1SA 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:9); ; [2CH 6:41](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:41) parallel [PSA 132:9](https://ref.ly/Ps132:9); ; [PSA 16:3](https://ref.ly/Ps16:3), [PSA 31:23](https://ref.ly/Ps31:23); ; [DAN 7:18](https://ref.ly/Dan7:18)

### The assembly

`assembly'' means`a community gathered together in response to God's call to serve and worship him''. Its NT equivalents include the synagogue and the church: [PSA 1:5](https://ref.ly/Ps1:5), [PSA 107:32](https://ref.ly/Ps107:32), [PSA 149:1](https://ref.ly/Ps149:1)

The scope of the OT people of God
---------------------------------

### Israel as God's people

**[EXO 6:7](https://ref.ly/Exod6:7)** *See also* [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6); [LEV 26:12](https://ref.ly/Lev26:12); [JER 30:22](https://ref.ly/Jer30:22); [EZK 36:28](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:28); [HOS 2:23](https://ref.ly/Hos2:23)

### Not all Israelites are God's people

**[ROM 9:6–9:7](https://ref.ly/Rom9:6-Rom9:7)** *Even within Israel there are believers and unbelievers.* *See also* [EZR 9:8](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:8) *Those Israelites who believed were sometimes called “a remnant”*; [ISA 1:9](https://ref.ly/Isa1:9), [ISA 11:11](https://ref.ly/Isa11:11), [ISA 11:16](https://ref.ly/Isa11:16); [JER 23:3](https://ref.ly/Jer23:3); [EZK 14:22](https://ref.ly/Ezek14:22); [MIC 2:12](https://ref.ly/Mic2:12)

### God's people included non\-Israelites

**[ISA 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Isa2:2-Isa2:3)** parallel [MIC 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/Mic4:1-Mic4:2) *See also* [EXO 12:38](https://ref.ly/Exod12:38), [EXO 12:48–12:49](https://ref.ly/Exod12:48-Exod12:49); [DEU 31:12](https://ref.ly/Deut31:12); [RUT 4:10–4:11](https://ref.ly/Ruth4:10-Ruth4:11)

The formation of the OT people of God
-------------------------------------

### God's people are formed through God's promises

**[GEN 12:2](https://ref.ly/Gen12:2)** *See also* [GEN 15:5](https://ref.ly/Gen15:5), [GEN 17:5–17:6](https://ref.ly/Gen17:5-Gen17:6), [GEN 22:17–22:18](https://ref.ly/Gen22:17-Gen22:18); [EXO 1:7](https://ref.ly/Exod1:7)

### God's people are chosen and called

**[DEU 7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:6)** *See also* [1CH 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:13) parallel [PSA 105:6](https://ref.ly/Ps105:6); [PSA 33:12](https://ref.ly/Ps33:12); [EZK 20:5](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:5)

### God's people have been redeemed

**[DEU 5:6](https://ref.ly/Deut5:6)** parallel [EXO 20:2](https://ref.ly/Exod20:2) *See also* [EXO 6:6](https://ref.ly/Exod6:6), [EXO 19:4](https://ref.ly/Exod19:4); [EZK 20:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:6)

### God formed a covenant with his people

**[EXO 24:8](https://ref.ly/Exod24:8)** *See also* [EXO 19:5](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5), [EXO 34:10](https://ref.ly/Exod34:10), [EXO 34:27](https://ref.ly/Exod34:27); [DEU 4:13](https://ref.ly/Deut4:13); [JDG 2:1](https://ref.ly/Judg2:1); [JER 31:31](https://ref.ly/Jer31:31)

OT images of the people of God
------------------------------

### As God's bride

**[JER 2:2](https://ref.ly/Jer2:2)** *This OT image is taken up in the many references to Jesus Christ as the bridegroom and the church as his bride.* *See also* [ISA 62:5](https://ref.ly/Isa62:5); [HOS 2:16](https://ref.ly/Hos2:16), [HOS 2:19–2:20](https://ref.ly/Hos2:19-Hos2:20); [EPH 5:25–5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25-Eph5:27); [REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2)

### As God's vine

**[ISA 5:1–5:7](https://ref.ly/Isa5:1-Isa5:7)** [PSA 80:8](https://ref.ly/Ps80:8); ; [JER 2:21](https://ref.ly/Jer2:21); ; [EZK 17:5–17:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek17:5-Ezek17:6), [EZK 19:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek19:10); ; [HOS 10:1](https://ref.ly/Hos10:1)

### As God's flock

**[PSA 95:7](https://ref.ly/Ps95:7)** *See also* [PSA 74:1](https://ref.ly/Ps74:1), [PSA 77:20](https://ref.ly/Ps77:20), [PSA 100:3](https://ref.ly/Ps100:3); [ISA 40:11](https://ref.ly/Isa40:11); [ZEC 9:16](https://ref.ly/Zech9:16); [MAT 26:31](https://ref.ly/Matt26:31); [ZEC 13:7](https://ref.ly/Zech13:7); [LUK 12:32](https://ref.ly/Luke12:32); [JHN 10:16](https://ref.ly/John10:16)ACT [20:28–20:29](https://ref.ly/John20:28-John20:29); [1PE 5:2–5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2-1Pet5:3)

### As God's inheritance

**[DEU 4:20](https://ref.ly/Deut4:20)** *See also* [PSA 28:9](https://ref.ly/Ps28:9), [PSA 33:12](https://ref.ly/Ps33:12); [ISA 19:25](https://ref.ly/Isa19:25); [MAL 3:17](https://ref.ly/Mal3:17)

### As God's family

**[AMO 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Amos3:1-Amos3:2)** *See also* [EXO 4:22–4:23](https://ref.ly/Exod4:22-Exod4:23) *Israel was sometimes called God's “firstborn son” as well as his children*; [DEU 1:31](https://ref.ly/Deut1:31), [DEU 32:6](https://ref.ly/Deut32:6); [PSA 103:13](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13); [ISA 1:2](https://ref.ly/Isa1:2), [ISA 30:9](https://ref.ly/Isa30:9); [HOS 11:1](https://ref.ly/Hos11:1); [MAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Mal2:10)

Requirements of the people of God
---------------------------------

### To obey God's word

**[DEU 5:1](https://ref.ly/Deut5:1)** *See also* [EXO 24:3](https://ref.ly/Exod24:3); [DEU 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Deut6:1-Deut6:3), [DEU 13:4](https://ref.ly/Deut13:4); [JOS 1:7](https://ref.ly/Josh1:7); [1SA 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:22)

### To remember their redemption

**[DEU 5:15](https://ref.ly/Deut5:15)** *See also* [DEU 7:18](https://ref.ly/Deut7:18), [DEU 15:15](https://ref.ly/Deut15:15), [DEU 16:12](https://ref.ly/Deut16:12); [PSA 105:5](https://ref.ly/Ps105:5)

### To commemorate their redemption

**[EXO 12:25–12:27](https://ref.ly/Exod12:25-Exod12:27)** *The focus of Israel's commemoration of their redemption was the Passover, which is one of the ceremonies lying behind the Lord's Supper.* *See also* [NUM 9:2–9:3](https://ref.ly/Num9:2-Num9:3); [DEU 16:1](https://ref.ly/Deut16:1); [LUK 22:14–22:20](https://ref.ly/Luke22:14-Luke22:20)

### To love God wholeheartedly

**[DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5)** *See also* [DEU 10:12](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12), [DEU 11:1](https://ref.ly/Deut11:1), [DEU 19:9](https://ref.ly/Deut19:9); [JOS 23:11](https://ref.ly/Josh23:11)

The marks of the people of God
------------------------------

### Circumcision as a mark of God's people

[GEN 17:10–17:14](https://ref.ly/Gen17:10-Gen17:14); ; [LEV 12:3](https://ref.ly/Lev12:3); [DEU 10:16](https://ref.ly/Deut10:16), [DEU 30:6](https://ref.ly/Deut30:6); ; [JER 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jer4:4); ; [ROM 2:27](https://ref.ly/Rom2:27); ; [COL 2:11](https://ref.ly/Col2:11)

### The presence of God

[EXO 25:8](https://ref.ly/Exod25:8), [EXO 33:15–33:16](https://ref.ly/Exod33:15-Exod33:16), [EXO 40:35](https://ref.ly/Exod40:35); ; [NUM 10:33–10:36](https://ref.ly/Num10:33-Num10:36); ; [2CH 5:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr5:14)

## 7024: church, nature and foundations of (id: 7024)

The church is the people called by God, who are united by their faith in Christ and by their common life in him. Various descriptions and metaphors emphasise the continuity between the people of God in the OT and NT.

NT images of the church
-----------------------

### The body of Christ

**[ROM 12:4–12:5](https://ref.ly/Rom12:4-Rom12:5)** *See also* [1CO 12:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:12), [1CO 12:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:27); [EPH 3:6](https://ref.ly/Eph3:6), [EPH 5:23](https://ref.ly/Eph5:23); [COL 1:18](https://ref.ly/Col1:18), [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24), [COL 2:19](https://ref.ly/Col2:19), [COL 3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:15)

### God's building or temple

**[1CO 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:16-1Cor3:17)** *See also* [1CO 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:10); [2CO 6:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:16); [EPH 2:21–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:21-Eph2:22); [HEB 3:6](https://ref.ly/Heb3:6), [HEB 10:21](https://ref.ly/Heb10:21); [1PE 2:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:5)

### A plant or vine

**[JHN 15:1–15:8](https://ref.ly/John15:1-John15:8)** *See also* [ROM 11:17–11:24](https://ref.ly/Rom11:17-Rom11:24); [1CO 3:6–3:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:6-1Cor3:8)

### Jesus Christ's flock

**[JHN 10:14–10:16](https://ref.ly/John10:14-John10:16)** *See also* [MAT 25:33](https://ref.ly/Matt25:33); [LUK 12:32](https://ref.ly/Luke12:32); [ACT 20:28–20:29](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28-Acts20:29); [1PE 5:2–5:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2-1Pet5:4)

### The bride of Christ

**[REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2)** *See also* [EPH 5:25–5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25-Eph5:27), [EPH 5:31–5:32](https://ref.ly/Eph5:31-Eph5:32); [REV 19:7](https://ref.ly/Rev19:7), [REV 22:17](https://ref.ly/Rev22:17)

### God's household or family

**[EPH 2:19](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19)** *See also* [JHN 8:35–8:36](https://ref.ly/John8:35-John8:36); [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [EPH 3:15](https://ref.ly/Eph3:15); [1TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:15); [HEB 2:11](https://ref.ly/Heb2:11); [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17), [1PE 4:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:17)

NT descriptions of the church
-----------------------------

### Emphasising continuity with the OT church

Abraham's offspring: [ROM 4:16](https://ref.ly/Rom4:16); ; [GAL 3:7](https://ref.ly/Gal3:7), [GAL 3:29](https://ref.ly/Gal3:29); [ROM 9:25](https://ref.ly/Rom9:25); ; [2CO 6:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:16); ; [HEB 13:12](https://ref.ly/Heb13:12); ; [1PE 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9-1Pet2:10); [GAL 4:26](https://ref.ly/Gal4:26); ; [HEB 12:22](https://ref.ly/Heb12:22); ; [REV 3:12](https://ref.ly/Rev3:12), [REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2), [REV 21:9–21:10](https://ref.ly/Rev21:9-Rev21:10); [GAL 6:16](https://ref.ly/Gal6:16) *the Israel of God*

### Emphasising God's call and authority in the church

Sons of God: [MAT 5:9](https://ref.ly/Matt5:9); ; [JHN 1:12](https://ref.ly/John1:12); ; [ROM 8:15–8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:15-Rom8:16); ; [2CO 6:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:18); ; [GAL 3:26](https://ref.ly/Gal3:26), [GAL 4:5–4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:5-Gal4:6); ; [1JN 3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:10); [MAT 24:22](https://ref.ly/Matt24:22); ; [ROM 11:7](https://ref.ly/Rom11:7); ; [2TI 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:10); ; [1PE 1:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:1); [ROM 8:17](https://ref.ly/Rom8:17); ; [GAL 3:29](https://ref.ly/Gal3:29), [GAL 4:7](https://ref.ly/Gal4:7); ; [TIT 3:7](https://ref.ly/Titus3:7); ; [HEB 1:14](https://ref.ly/Heb1:14), [HEB 6:17](https://ref.ly/Heb6:17); ; [1PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:4); [1PE 2:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:5), [1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9); ; [REV 1:6](https://ref.ly/Rev1:6), [REV 5:10](https://ref.ly/Rev5:10), [REV 20:6](https://ref.ly/Rev20:6)

### Descriptions applied to the church by outsiders

Followers of the Way: [ACT 9:2](https://ref.ly/Acts9:2), [ACT 19:9](https://ref.ly/Acts19:9), [ACT 19:23](https://ref.ly/Acts19:23), [ACT 22:4](https://ref.ly/Acts22:4), [ACT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Acts24:14); [ACT 11:26](https://ref.ly/Acts11:26) *Christians*; ; [ACT 24:5](https://ref.ly/Acts24:5) *“the Nazarene sect” means people belonging to Jesus the “Nazarene” ([Mt 2:23](https://ref.ly/Matt2:23))*

### Descriptions used by Christians

The believers. All these titles are seldom in the singular, emphasising the corporateness of Christian life: [ACT 1:15](https://ref.ly/Acts1:15), [ACT 2:44](https://ref.ly/Acts2:44), [ACT 5:12](https://ref.ly/Acts5:12); ; [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); ; [1TI 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:12); ; [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17); [ACT 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/Acts6:1-Acts6:2), [ACT 9:19](https://ref.ly/Acts9:19), [ACT 11:26](https://ref.ly/Acts11:26), [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22), [ACT 20:1](https://ref.ly/Acts20:1); [ROM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Rom1:7), [ROM 15:25](https://ref.ly/Rom15:25); ; [1CO 6:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:1), [1CO 14:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:33); ; [EPH 1:1](https://ref.ly/Eph1:1); ; [PHP 4:21](https://ref.ly/Phil4:21); ; [COL 1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:12); ; [JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)

### Other NT descriptions of the church

[1TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:15) *the pillar and foundation of the truth*; ; [HEB 12:23](https://ref.ly/Heb12:23) *The church of the firstborn. “the firstborn” is plural, referring to Christians as those born again through their union with Christ, who is the firstborn.*

The foundation of the church
----------------------------

### Jesus Christ as the church's foundation\-stone

**[1CO 3:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:11)** *See also* [MAT 7:24–7:25](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:25), [MAT 21:42](https://ref.ly/Matt21:42) parallels [MRK 12:10](https://ref.ly/Mark12:10), [LUK 20:17](https://ref.ly/Luke20:17); [ACT 4:11](https://ref.ly/Acts4:11); [EPH 2:20](https://ref.ly/Eph2:20); [1PE 2:6](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:6); [ISA 28:16](https://ref.ly/Isa28:16); [1PE 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:7); [PSA 118:22](https://ref.ly/Ps118:22)

### Apostles and prophets as founders of the church

**[EPH 2:19–2:20](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19-Eph2:20)** *See also* [MAT 16:18–16:19](https://ref.ly/Matt16:18-Matt16:19); [REV 21:14](https://ref.ly/Rev21:14)

The church as God's people
--------------------------

### A people chosen by God

**[1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9)** *See also* [JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16); [ROM 8:33](https://ref.ly/Rom8:33); [EPH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [2TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13); [JAS 2:5](https://ref.ly/Jas2:5); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2)

### A people called by God

**[ROM 1:6](https://ref.ly/Rom1:6)** *See also* [ACT 2:39](https://ref.ly/Acts2:39); [1CO 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:2), [1CO 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:9); [GAL 1:6](https://ref.ly/Gal1:6); [2TH 2:14](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:14); [2TI 1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:9); [JUD 1:1](https://ref.ly/Jude1:1)

### A people loved by God

**[1PE 2:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:10)** *See also* [EPH 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/Eph2:1-Eph2:5); [TIT 3:4–3:7](https://ref.ly/Titus3:4-Titus3:7)

### God's covenant people

## 7025: church, unity and fellowship of (id: 7025)

The church is one in essence, because it is founded on one gospel, united to one Lord and indwelt by one Spirit. Its unity is under constant threat because of the tendency to division that is inherent in fallen humanity, and needs to be continually maintained and actively expressed in fellowship.

The unity of the church
-----------------------

### The church is one

**[ROM 12:5](https://ref.ly/Rom12:5)** *See also* [1CO 12:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:12), [1CO 12:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:20); [EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25)

### The church transcends all barriers

**[COL 3:11](https://ref.ly/Col3:11)** *See also* [JHN 10:16](https://ref.ly/John10:16); [ACT 10:28–10:29](https://ref.ly/Acts10:28-Acts10:29), [ACT 10:47](https://ref.ly/Acts10:47), [ACT 15:8–15:9](https://ref.ly/Acts15:8-Acts15:9); [GAL 3:28](https://ref.ly/Gal3:28); [EPH 2:14–2:16](https://ref.ly/Eph2:14-Eph2:16), [EPH 3:6](https://ref.ly/Eph3:6) *The great divide threatening the first Christians was between Jew and Gentile, but the church was able to unite the two into one body in Christ.*

### The church's unity reflects the unity within the Trinity

**[EPH 4:4–4:6](https://ref.ly/Eph4:4-Eph4:6)** *The unity of the church is built around the persons of the Trinity: one Spirit, one Lord, one Father.* *See also* [JHN 17:11](https://ref.ly/John17:11); [ROM 3:29–3:30](https://ref.ly/Rom3:29-Rom3:30), [ROM 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Rom10:12-Rom10:13); [GAL 3:27–3:28](https://ref.ly/Gal3:27-Gal3:28)

### The church's unity is the work of the Trinity

**[EPH 2:16–2:18](https://ref.ly/Eph2:16-Eph2:18)** *See also* [JHN 11:52](https://ref.ly/John11:52); [ACT 10:45–10:47](https://ref.ly/Acts10:45-Acts10:47); [1CO 12:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:13); [EPH 2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:22), [EPH 4:3](https://ref.ly/Eph4:3)

The purpose of the church's unity
---------------------------------

### To lead others to faith

**[JHN 17:23](https://ref.ly/John17:23)** *See also* [JHN 17:21](https://ref.ly/John17:21)

### To lead believers to maturity

**[EPH 4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:13)**

The nature of the church's unity
--------------------------------

**[PHP 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Phil2:1-Phil2:2)** *Emphasis is placed on an inner unity of mind and spirit rather than external uniformity.* *See also* [2CO 13:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:11); [PHP 1:27](https://ref.ly/Phil1:27); [COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2)

Appeals for unity in the church
-------------------------------

**[EPH 4:3](https://ref.ly/Eph4:3)** *See also* [ROM 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rom12:10), [ROM 15:5](https://ref.ly/Rom15:5), [ROM 15:7](https://ref.ly/Rom15:7); [1CO 12:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:25); [COL 3:14](https://ref.ly/Col3:14); [1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8)

The church's unity is expressed in fellowship
---------------------------------------------

### Fellowship with God

**[1CO 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:9)** *See also* [2CO 13:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:14); [PHP 2:1](https://ref.ly/Phil2:1); [2PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:4); [1JN 1:3](https://ref.ly/1John1:3), [1JN 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1John1:6-1John1:7)

### Fellowship expressed by meeting together

**[ACT 2:46](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46)** *See also* [ACT 2:1](https://ref.ly/Acts2:1), [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42), [ACT 5:12](https://ref.ly/Acts5:12), [ACT 6:2](https://ref.ly/Acts6:2); [1CO 14:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:26); [HEB 10:25](https://ref.ly/Heb10:25)

### Fellowship expressed through sharing resources

**[ACT 2:44–2:45](https://ref.ly/Acts2:44-Acts2:45)** *See also* [ACT 4:32](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32), [ACT 4:34–4:37](https://ref.ly/Acts4:34-Acts4:37), [ACT 11:27–11:30](https://ref.ly/Acts11:27-Acts11:30); [ROM 15:26](https://ref.ly/Rom15:26); [1CO 16:1–16:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:1-1Cor16:2); [2CO 8:2–8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:2-2Cor8:5), [2CO 8:13–8:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:13-2Cor8:14), [2CO 9:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:13); [PHP 4:14–4:18](https://ref.ly/Phil4:14-Phil4:18)

### Fellowship through suffering

**[REV 1:9](https://ref.ly/Rev1:9)** *See also* [ROM 8:17](https://ref.ly/Rom8:17); [2CO 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:7); [PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10), [PHP 4:14](https://ref.ly/Phil4:14); [HEB 10:33–10:34](https://ref.ly/Heb10:33-Heb10:34), [HEB 13:3](https://ref.ly/Heb13:3)

### Fellowship through shared spiritual blessings

**[1CO 9:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:23)** *See also* [ROM 11:17](https://ref.ly/Rom11:17); [PHP 1:7](https://ref.ly/Phil1:7); [2TH 2:14](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:14); [1PE 5:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:1); [JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)

Specific actions which express fellowship and unity in the church
-----------------------------------------------------------------

### Sharing in the Lord's Supper

**[1CO 10:16–10:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:16-1Cor10:17)** *See also* [ACT 2:46](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46), [ACT 20:7](https://ref.ly/Acts20:7); [1CO 11:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:33)

### Baptism as an expression of unity

**[EPH 4:4–4:6](https://ref.ly/Eph4:4-Eph4:6)** *See also* [1CO 12:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:13)

### Extending hospitality

[ACT 28:7](https://ref.ly/Acts28:7); ; [ROM 12:13](https://ref.ly/Rom12:13), [ROM 16:23](https://ref.ly/Rom16:23); ; [1TI 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:10); ; [TIT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Titus1:8); ; [1PE 4:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:9); ; [3JN 1:8](https://ref.ly/3John1:8)

### Greeting one another

[ACT 18:27](https://ref.ly/Acts18:27); ; [ROM 16:3–16:16](https://ref.ly/Rom16:3-Rom16:16); ; [1CO 16:19–16:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:19-1Cor16:20); ; [COL 4:10](https://ref.ly/Col4:10); ; [PHM 1:17](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:17)

### Welcoming former opponents

[ACT 9:26–9:27](https://ref.ly/Acts9:26-Acts9:27); ; [GAL 2:9](https://ref.ly/Gal2:9); ; [2CO 2:5–2:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:5-2Cor2:8)

Divisions in the church
-----------------------

### Causes of division in the NT church

Personal ambition: [MRK 9:34](https://ref.ly/Mark9:34), [MRK 10:35–10:41](https://ref.ly/Mark10:35-Mark10:41) parallel [MAT 20:20–20:24](https://ref.ly/Matt20:20-Matt20:24); [ACT 6:1](https://ref.ly/Acts6:1); [ACT 15:37–15:40](https://ref.ly/Acts15:37-Acts15:40); ; [PHP 4:2](https://ref.ly/Phil4:2); [ROM 16:17](https://ref.ly/Rom16:17); ; [JUD 1:19](https://ref.ly/Jude1:19); [1CO 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:11-1Cor1:12), [1CO 3:3–3:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:3-1Cor3:4); [1CO 6:1–6:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:1-1Cor6:6) *litigation and disputes*; [1CO 11:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:18), [1CO 11:20–11:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:20-1Cor11:21); ; [JAS 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Jas4:1-Jas4:3)

### Warnings against divisions in the church

**[1CO 1:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:10)** *See also* [ROM 12:16](https://ref.ly/Rom12:16), [ROM 16:17](https://ref.ly/Rom16:17); [2CO 12:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:20); [EPH 4:31](https://ref.ly/Eph4:31); [JAS 4:11](https://ref.ly/Jas4:11)

### Acceptable differences in the church

In secondary matters of conscience, Christians are to respect rather than judge each other. These things need not impair the essential unity that is in Christ: [ROM 14:1–14:3](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1-Rom14:3), [ROM 14:5–14:6](https://ref.ly/Rom14:5-Rom14:6); ; [1CO 8:9–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9-1Cor8:13); [1CO 12:4–12:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:4-1Cor12:6), [1CO 12:14–12:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:14-1Cor12:25); ; [GAL 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gal2:7)

### Necessary divisions in the church

Between the true gospel and heretical alternatives: [2CO 11:2–11:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:2-2Cor11:6), [2CO 11:13–11:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:13-2Cor11:15); ; [GAL 1:6–1:9](https://ref.ly/Gal1:6-Gal1:9); ; [COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8), [COL 2:16–2:19](https://ref.ly/Col2:16-Col2:19); ; [1TI 4:1–4:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1-1Tim4:6); ; [1JN 2:18–2:19](https://ref.ly/1John2:18-1John2:19); ; [2JN 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/2John1:9-2John1:11); ; [JUD 1:18–1:20](https://ref.ly/Jude1:18-Jude1:20); [1CO 5:9–5:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:9-1Cor5:10); ; [2TH 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:6); ; [1TI 6:3–6:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:3-1Tim6:5); ; [2TI 3:2–3:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:2-2Tim3:9); ; [2PE 1:20–1:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:20-2Pet1:21), [2PE 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1-2Pet2:3); ; [REV 2:20](https://ref.ly/Rev2:20), [REV 2:24](https://ref.ly/Rev2:24), [REV 3:1](https://ref.ly/Rev3:1), [REV 3:4](https://ref.ly/Rev3:4); [ACT 15:2](https://ref.ly/Acts15:2), [ACT 15:5–15:6](https://ref.ly/Acts15:5-Acts15:6), [ACT 15:19](https://ref.ly/Acts15:19); ; [GAL 2:11](https://ref.ly/Gal2:11)

## 7026: church, leadership of (id: 7026)

Jesus Christ is the absolute head of the church. He sets leaders in the church to enable the whole church to grow into maturity. Christ's authority in the church is acknowledged more by the church's obedience to God than through any particular form of government.

Jesus Christ alone is head of the church
----------------------------------------

**[COL 1:18](https://ref.ly/Col1:18)** *See also* [MAT 23:8–23:10](https://ref.ly/Matt23:8-Matt23:10); [EPH 1:22](https://ref.ly/Eph1:22), [EPH 4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15), [EPH 5:23](https://ref.ly/Eph5:23); [COL 2:19](https://ref.ly/Col2:19); [HEB 3:3](https://ref.ly/Heb3:3)

The Holy Spirit directs the church
----------------------------------

**[ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2)** *See also* [ACT 15:28](https://ref.ly/Acts15:28), [ACT 16:6–16:7](https://ref.ly/Acts16:6-Acts16:7), [ACT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28); [ROM 8:14](https://ref.ly/Rom8:14); [1CO 12:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:11); [REV 2:7](https://ref.ly/Rev2:7), [REV 2:11](https://ref.ly/Rev2:11)

The appointment of leaders in the church
----------------------------------------

### God calls and equips leaders

**[EPH 4:11](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11)** *See also* [MAT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Matt16:18); [ACT 1:24–1:26](https://ref.ly/Acts1:24-Acts1:26), [ACT 9:15–9:16](https://ref.ly/Acts9:15-Acts9:16), [ACT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28), [ACT 26:16–26:18](https://ref.ly/Acts26:16-Acts26:18); [1CO 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:28); [GAL 1:15–1:17](https://ref.ly/Gal1:15-Gal1:17)

### Delegated leadership

[ACT 6:3–6:6](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3-Acts6:6), [ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23); ; [TIT 1:5](https://ref.ly/Titus1:5)

### The appointment of apostles

**[MRK 3:13–3:19](https://ref.ly/Mark3:13-Mark3:19)** parallels [MAT 10:1–10:4](https://ref.ly/Matt10:1-Matt10:4), [LUK 6:12–6:16](https://ref.ly/Luke6:12-Luke6:16) [1CO 9:1–9:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:1-1Cor9:2); ; [2CO 3:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:3); ; [EPH 2:20](https://ref.ly/Eph2:20); ; [REV 21:14](https://ref.ly/Rev21:14); [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42), [ACT 15:6](https://ref.ly/Acts15:6), [ACT 15:22–15:23](https://ref.ly/Acts15:22-Acts15:23); ; [1TH 2:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:6); ; [2PE 3:2](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:2); ; [JUD 1:17](https://ref.ly/Jude1:17)

### Prophets as leaders

**[ACT 15:32](https://ref.ly/Acts15:32)** *Judas and Silas were leaders in the Jerusalem church ([Ac 15:22](https://ref.ly/Acts15:22)).* *See also* [ACT 11:27–11:30](https://ref.ly/Acts11:27-Acts11:30), [ACT 13:1–13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:1-Acts13:2); [ROM 12:6](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6) *The role of prophets as leaders is distinct from the gift of prophecy, which was in principle available to all*; [1CO 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:28), [1CO 14:29–14:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:29-1Cor14:30); [EPH 3:5](https://ref.ly/Eph3:5)

### Evangelists as leaders

**[ACT 21:8](https://ref.ly/Acts21:8)** *See also* [EPH 4:11](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11); [2TI 4:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:5)

### Pastors and teachers as leaders

**[ACT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28)** *See also* [JHN 21:15–21:17](https://ref.ly/John21:15-John21:17); [ACT 13:1](https://ref.ly/Acts13:1); [ROM 12:7](https://ref.ly/Rom12:7); [1CO 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:28); [1TI 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2); [TIT 1:9](https://ref.ly/Titus1:9); [JAS 3:1](https://ref.ly/Jas3:1); [1PE 5:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2) *Pastors are also called “shepherds”.*

### Elders as leaders

**[1TI 3:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:1)** *“Elder” and “overseer” or “bishop” are more or less interchangeable.* *See also* [ACT 11:30](https://ref.ly/Acts11:30), [ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23), [ACT 15:2](https://ref.ly/Acts15:2), [ACT 15:22](https://ref.ly/Acts15:22), [ACT 20:17](https://ref.ly/Acts20:17); [1TI 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17); [TIT 1:5](https://ref.ly/Titus1:5); [JAS 5:14](https://ref.ly/Jas5:14); [2JN 1:1](https://ref.ly/2John1:1)

### Deacons as leaders

**[PHP 1:1](https://ref.ly/Phil1:1)** *“Deacon” means “one who serves”.* *See also* [ACT 6:5–6:6](https://ref.ly/Acts6:5-Acts6:6); [1TI 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:8)

Qualifications for church leadership
------------------------------------

The first apostles were witnesses of Jesus Christ's life and resurrection: [ACT 1:21–1:22](https://ref.ly/Acts1:21-Acts1:22), [ACT 10:41](https://ref.ly/Acts10:41); ; [1CO 9:1–9:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:1-1Cor9:2), [1CO 15:7–15:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:7-1Cor15:8); ; [2PE 1:16](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:16); [ACT 6:3](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3); ; [1TI 3:1–3:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:1-1Tim3:12), [1TI 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17); ; [TIT 1:6–1:9](https://ref.ly/Titus1:6-Titus1:9); ; [1PE 5:1–5:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:1-1Pet5:4)

Responsibilities of church leaders
----------------------------------

### To preach the gospel

[ROM 1:15](https://ref.ly/Rom1:15); ; [1CO 1:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:17); ; [GAL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Gal2:8); ; [EPH 3:8](https://ref.ly/Eph3:8); ; [1TI 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:7)

### To teach sound doctrine

[1TI 4:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:6), [1TI 4:13](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:13), [1TI 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17); ; [HEB 13:7](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7)

### To give direction in church life

[ACT 15:2](https://ref.ly/Acts15:2), [ACT 15:6](https://ref.ly/Acts15:6), [ACT 15:22–15:23](https://ref.ly/Acts15:22-Acts15:23), [ACT 16:4](https://ref.ly/Acts16:4), [ACT 20:28–20:31](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28-Acts20:31); ; [1TI 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17); ; [1PE 5:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2)

### To be an example in loving service

[MAT 20:26–20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:26-Matt20:28) parallel [MRK 10:43–10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:43-Mark10:45); ; [MRK 9:35](https://ref.ly/Mark9:35); ; [JHN 13:13–13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:13-John13:15); ; [HEB 13:7](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7); ; [1PE 5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:3)

### To train and appoint other leaders

[ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23); ; [1TI 4:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:14); ; [2TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:2); ; [TIT 1:5](https://ref.ly/Titus1:5)

### To pray for the sick

[JAS 5:14](https://ref.ly/Jas5:14)

### To exercise discipline in the church

[2CO 13:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:10); ; [1TH 5:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:12); ; [1TI 1:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:20), [1TI 5:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:20); ; [TIT 3:10](https://ref.ly/Titus3:10); ; [3JN 1:10](https://ref.ly/3John1:10)

The church's responsibilities to its leaders
--------------------------------------------

### To respect and submit to its leaders

[ACT 16:4](https://ref.ly/Acts16:4); ; [1TH 5:12–5:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:12-1Thess5:13); ; [1TI 5:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:19); ; [HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17)

### To pray for its leaders

[EPH 6:19](https://ref.ly/Eph6:19); ; [1TH 5:25](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:25)

### To support its leaders financially

[1CO 9:7–9:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:7-1Cor9:14); ; [PHP 4:15–4:19](https://ref.ly/Phil4:15-Phil4:19); ; [1TI 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17-1Tim5:18)

The corporate government of the church
--------------------------------------

### In choosing leaders

[ACT 6:3–6:6](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3-Acts6:6)

### In implementing decisions

[ACT 15:22–15:29](https://ref.ly/Acts15:22-Acts15:29)

### In building up the church

[ROM 12:4–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:4-Rom12:8); ; [1CO 12:4–12:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:4-1Cor12:12), [1CO 12:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:27); ; [EPH 4:3](https://ref.ly/Eph4:3), [EPH 4:7–4:16](https://ref.ly/Eph4:7-Eph4:16); ; [1PE 4:10–4:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:10-1Pet4:11)

### In discerning true and false teachings

[1JN 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/1John4:1-1John4:3); ; [2JN 1:10](https://ref.ly/2John1:10); ; [REV 2:2](https://ref.ly/Rev2:2)

### In exercising discipline

[MAT 18:15–18:20](https://ref.ly/Matt18:15-Matt18:20); ; [1CO 5:4–5:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:4-1Cor5:5); ; [2CO 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:6-2Cor2:8); ; [2TH 3:14–3:15](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:14-2Thess3:15)

The structure of the church
---------------------------

### The pattern of church life

**[ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42)** *See also* [ACT 2:46](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46), [ACT 5:42](https://ref.ly/Acts5:42)

### The house church

[ACT 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Acts1:13-Acts1:14), [ACT 12:12](https://ref.ly/Acts12:12), [ACT 16:40](https://ref.ly/Acts16:40); ; [ROM 16:5](https://ref.ly/Rom16:5); ; [1CO 16:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:19); ; [COL 4:15](https://ref.ly/Col4:15); ; [PHM 1:2](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:2)

### The local church

[ACT 13:1](https://ref.ly/Acts13:1); ; [ROM 16:1](https://ref.ly/Rom16:1); ; [1CO 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:2) *It is unknown whether there were subdivisions of the church in towns such as Corinth*; ; [1TH 1:1](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:1)

### Churches in a region

[ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31), [ACT 15:41](https://ref.ly/Acts15:41); ; [1CO 16:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:1); ; [2CO 8:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:1); ; [GAL 1:2](https://ref.ly/Gal1:2), [GAL 1:22](https://ref.ly/Gal1:22); ; [REV 1:4](https://ref.ly/Rev1:4) *Normally the NT speaks of “churches” in an area rather than of a unified regional structure.*

### The universal church

**[MAT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Matt16:18)** [1CO 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:28); ; [EPH 1:22](https://ref.ly/Eph1:22), [EPH 3:10](https://ref.ly/Eph3:10), [EPH 5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25)

1 Corinthians 12:11; Revelation 2:7; Revelation 2:11; Ephesians 4:11; Matthew 16:18; Acts 1:24-26; Acts 9:15-16; Acts 26:16-18; 1 Corinthians 12:28; Galatians 1:15-17; Acts 6:3-6; Acts 14:23; Titus 1:5; 1 Peter 5:2; 1 Timothy 3:1; Acts 11:30; Acts 15:2; Acts 20:17; 1 Timothy 5:17; James 5:14; 2 John 1:1; Philippians 1:1; Acts 6:5-6; 1 Timothy 3:8; Acts 1:21-22; Acts 10:41; 1 Corinthians 15:7-8; 2 Peter 1:16; Acts 6:3; 1 Timothy 3:1-12; Titus 1:6-9; 1 Peter 5:1-4; Romans 1:15; 1 Corinthians 1:17; Galatians 2:8; Ephesians 3:8; 1 Timothy 2:7; 1 Timothy 4:6; 1 Timothy 4:13; Hebrews 13:7; Acts 16:4; Acts 20:28-31; Matthew 20:26-28; Mark 10:43-45; Mark 9:35; John 13:13-15; 1 Peter 5:3; 1 Timothy 4:14; 2 Timothy 2:2; 2 Corinthians 13:10; 1 Thessalonians 5:12; 1 Timothy 1:20; 1 Timothy 5:20; Titus 3:10; 3 John 1:10; 1 Thessalonians 5:12-13; 1 Timothy 5:19; Hebrews 13:17; Ephesians 6:19; 1 Thessalonians 5:25; 1 Corinthians 9:7-14; Philippians 4:15-19; 1 Timothy 5:17-18; Acts 15:22-29; Romans 12:4-8; 1 Corinthians 12:4-12; ## 7027: church, purpose and mission of (id: 7027)

The church is called to praise and glorify God, to establish Jesus Christ's kingdom, and to proclaim the gospel throughout the world.

God's purposes for the church
-----------------------------

### To praise God

**[1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9)** *See also* [EPH 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/Eph1:5-Eph1:6), [EPH 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Eph1:11-Eph1:12), [EPH 1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:14); [HEB 13:15](https://ref.ly/Heb13:15); [1PE 2:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:5)

### To share God's glory

**[ROM 8:29–8:30](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29-Rom8:30)** *See also* [MAT 13:43](https://ref.ly/Matt13:43); [JHN 17:24](https://ref.ly/John17:24); [ROM 9:23](https://ref.ly/Rom9:23); [1CO 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:7); [PHP 3:21](https://ref.ly/Phil3:21); [COL 3:4](https://ref.ly/Col3:4); [2TH 2:14](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:14); [REV 2:26–2:27](https://ref.ly/Rev2:26-Rev2:27), [REV 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Rev3:4-Rev3:5), [REV 3:21](https://ref.ly/Rev3:21)

### God will build his church

**[MAT 16:18–16:19](https://ref.ly/Matt16:18-Matt16:19)** *See also* [MAT 27:40](https://ref.ly/Matt27:40) parallel [MRK 15:29](https://ref.ly/Mark15:29); [JHN 2:19–2:22](https://ref.ly/John2:19-John2:22); [1CO 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:9); [EPH 2:21–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:21-Eph2:22), [EPH 4:11–4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:13); [HEB 3:3–3:6](https://ref.ly/Heb3:3-Heb3:6); [1PE 2:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:5)

### To challenge Satan's dominion

**[EPH 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/Eph3:10-Eph3:11)** *“rulers and authorities in the heavenly realms” refers to the powers of evil.* *See also* [MAT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Matt16:18); [EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12); [1JN 2:14](https://ref.ly/1John2:14)

### To go into the world in mission

**[2CO 5:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:18)** *See also* [MAT 5:13–5:16](https://ref.ly/Matt5:13-Matt5:16), [MAT 28:19–28:20](https://ref.ly/Matt28:19-Matt28:20); [MRK 16:15](https://ref.ly/Mark16:15); [LUK 24:48](https://ref.ly/Luke24:48); [JHN 20:21](https://ref.ly/John20:21); [ACT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Acts1:8); [PHP 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/Phil2:15-Phil2:16); [COL 1:27](https://ref.ly/Col1:27)

The church's mission
--------------------

### To preach the gospel to the world

**[MRK 13:10](https://ref.ly/Mark13:10)** parallel [MAT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Matt24:14) *See also* [MAT 28:19](https://ref.ly/Matt28:19); [LUK 24:47](https://ref.ly/Luke24:47); [JHN 10:16](https://ref.ly/John10:16); [ACT 13:47](https://ref.ly/Acts13:47)

### To do good to all

**[GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10)** *See also* [MAT 25:37–25:40](https://ref.ly/Matt25:37-Matt25:40); [LUK 6:35](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35); [ACT 9:36](https://ref.ly/Acts9:36); [EPH 2:10](https://ref.ly/Eph2:10); [1TI 6:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:18); [JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27); [1PE 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:12)

### Images of the church's mission

**[MAT 5:13–5:16](https://ref.ly/Matt5:13-Matt5:16)**; **[JHN 15:5–15:8](https://ref.ly/John15:5-John15:8)** [MAT 7:18–7:19](https://ref.ly/Matt7:18-Matt7:19); ; [ROM 7:4](https://ref.ly/Rom7:4); ; [EPH 5:9–5:10](https://ref.ly/Eph5:9-Eph5:10); ; [PHP 1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:11); ; [COL 1:6](https://ref.ly/Col1:6), [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10); ; [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17); [MRK 9:50](https://ref.ly/Mark9:50); ; [LUK 14:34–14:35](https://ref.ly/Luke14:34-Luke14:35); [ROM 13:12–13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:12-Rom13:14); ; [EPH 5:8](https://ref.ly/Eph5:8); ; [PHP 2:15](https://ref.ly/Phil2:15); ; [1TH 5:5–5:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:5-1Thess5:6)

The growth of the church
------------------------

### Numerical growth among the first Christians

**[ACT 11:21](https://ref.ly/Acts11:21)** *See also* [ACT 2:41](https://ref.ly/Acts2:41), [ACT 2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:47), [ACT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Acts4:4), [ACT 5:14](https://ref.ly/Acts5:14), [ACT 6:1](https://ref.ly/Acts6:1), [ACT 6:7](https://ref.ly/Acts6:7), [ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31), [ACT 9:42](https://ref.ly/Acts9:42), [ACT 11:24](https://ref.ly/Acts11:24), [ACT 12:24](https://ref.ly/Acts12:24), [ACT 13:49](https://ref.ly/Acts13:49), [ACT 16:5](https://ref.ly/Acts16:5), [ACT 17:4](https://ref.ly/Acts17:4), [ACT 18:8](https://ref.ly/Acts18:8), [ACT 19:20](https://ref.ly/Acts19:20)

### The church is to grow to maturity

**[EPH 4:12–4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:12-Eph4:13)** *See also* [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6), [PHP 3:13–3:15](https://ref.ly/Phil3:13-Phil3:15); [2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)

### Aspects of growth

Growth in character: [2CO 9:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:10); ; [1TH 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:12); [EPH 4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15); ; [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10); ; [2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18); [HEB 6:1](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1) *growth in understanding*

### Prayers for the growth of the church

**[EPH 3:14–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:14-Eph3:19)** *See also* [EPH 1:17–1:19](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17-Eph1:19); [PHP 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:11); [COL 1:9–1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:9-Col1:12); [1TH 3:11–3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:11-1Thess3:13); [2TH 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:11-2Thess1:12)

Visions of the church's final destiny
-------------------------------------

**[REV 7:9–7:10](https://ref.ly/Rev7:9-Rev7:10)** *John's vision of the church in glory.* *See also* [MAT 24:31](https://ref.ly/Matt24:31); [JHN 10:16](https://ref.ly/John10:16); [EPH 1:10](https://ref.ly/Eph1:10); [1TH 4:16–4:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:16-1Thess4:17); [HEB 12:22–12:23](https://ref.ly/Heb12:22-Heb12:23); [REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Peter 2:9; Ephesians 1:5-6; Ephesians 1:11-12; Ephesians 1:14; Hebrews 13:15; 1 Peter 2:5; Romans 8:29-30; Matthew 13:43; John 17:24; Romans 9:23; 1 Corinthians 2:7; Philippians 3:21; Colossians 3:4; 2 Thessalonians 2:14; Revelation 2:26-27; Revelation 3:4-5; Revelation 3:21; Matthew 16:18-19; Matthew 27:40; Mark 15:29; John 2:19-22; 1 Corinthians 3:9; Ephesians 2:21-22; Ephesians 4:11-13; Hebrews 3:3-6; Ephesians 3:10-11; Matthew 16:18; Ephesians 6:12; 1 John 2:14; 2 Corinthians 5:18; Matthew 5:13-16; Matthew 28:19-20; Mark 16:15; Luke 24:48; John 20:21; Acts 1:8; Philippians 2:15-16; Colossians 1:27; Mark 13:10; Matthew 24:14; Matthew 28:19; Luke 24:47; John 10:16; Acts 13:47; Galatians 6:10; Matthew 25:37-40; Luke 6:35; Acts 9:36; Ephesians 2:10; 1 Timothy 6:18; James 1:27; 1 Peter 2:12; John 15:5-8; Matthew 7:18-19; Romans 7:4; Ephesians 5:9-10; Philippians 1:11; Colossians 1:6; Colossians 1:10; James 3:17; Mark 9:50; Luke 14:34-35; Romans 13:12-14; Ephesians 5:8; Philippians 2:15; 1 Thessalonians 5:5-6; Acts 11:21; Acts 2:41; Acts 2:47; Acts 4:4; Acts 5:14; Acts 6:1; Acts 6:7; Acts 9:31; Acts 9:42; Acts 11:24; Acts 12:24; Acts 13:49; Acts 16:5; Acts 17:4; Acts 18:8; Acts 19:20; Ephesians 4:12-13; Philippians 1:6; Philippians 3:13-15; 2 Thessalonians 1:3; 2 Corinthians 9:10; 1 Thessalonians 3:12; Ephesians 4:15; 2 Peter 3:18; Hebrews 6:1; Ephesians 3:14-19; Ephesians 1:17-19; Philippians 1:9-11; Colossians 1:9-12; 1 Thessalonians 3:11-13; 2 Thessalonians 1:11-12; Revelation 7:9-10; Matthew 24:31; Ephesians 1:10; 1 Thessalonians 4:16-17; Hebrews 12:22-23; Revelation 21:2

## 7028: church, life of (id: 7028)

The church lives its life in union with Christ and in the power of the Holy Spirit. It is called to mutual love, holy living, and to worship.

The church lives its life in union with Christ
----------------------------------------------

### The church lives in Christ and Christ lives in the church

**[1CO 1:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:30)** *See also* [MAT 18:20](https://ref.ly/Matt18:20); [JHN 15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:5), [JHN 17:21](https://ref.ly/John17:21); [1CO 8:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:6); [GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20); [COL 1:27](https://ref.ly/Col1:27), [COL 2:6](https://ref.ly/Col2:6); [1JN 4:13](https://ref.ly/1John4:13)

### Believers are united with Christ in baptism

**[GAL 3:27](https://ref.ly/Gal3:27)** *See also* [ACT 2:38](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38), [ACT 19:5](https://ref.ly/Acts19:5); [ROM 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/Rom6:3-Rom6:4); [COL 2:12](https://ref.ly/Col2:12)

The church lives its life in the power of the Holy Spirit
---------------------------------------------------------

### The church lives in the Spirit, and the Spirit lives in the church

**[ROM 8:9–8:11](https://ref.ly/Rom8:9-Rom8:11)** *The indwelling Spirit is identified with the presence of Jesus Christ.* *See also* [1CO 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:16); [GAL 5:16](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16), [GAL 5:25](https://ref.ly/Gal5:25); [EPH 2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:22); [2TI 1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:14); [1JN 2:27](https://ref.ly/1John2:27)

### The Spirit is given to the church

**[ACT 1:4–1:5](https://ref.ly/Acts1:4-Acts1:5)** *See also* [JHN 20:22](https://ref.ly/John20:22); [ACT 2:4](https://ref.ly/Acts2:4), [ACT 15:8](https://ref.ly/Acts15:8); [ROM 7:6](https://ref.ly/Rom7:6), [ROM 15:16](https://ref.ly/Rom15:16); [1CO 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:11); [GAL 3:3](https://ref.ly/Gal3:3); [1PE 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:1-1Pet1:2)

### The Spirit seals the church

**[EPH 1:13](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13)** *See also* [2CO 1:22](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:22), [2CO 5:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:5); [EPH 4:30](https://ref.ly/Eph4:30)

### The Spirit guides the church

**[REV 2:7](https://ref.ly/Rev2:7)** *See also* [ACT 8:29](https://ref.ly/Acts8:29), [ACT 10:19](https://ref.ly/Acts10:19), [ACT 11:12](https://ref.ly/Acts11:12), [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2), [ACT 20:23](https://ref.ly/Acts20:23), [ACT 21:4](https://ref.ly/Acts21:4)

### The Spirit teaches the church

**[1CO 2:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:13)** *See also* [JHN 16:13](https://ref.ly/John16:13); [EPH 1:17](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17)

### The Spirit sanctifies the church

**[ROM 15:16](https://ref.ly/Rom15:16)** *See also* [1CO 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:11); [2TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2)

### The Spirit endows the church with gifts

**[1CO 12:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:7)** *See also* [ROM 12:6–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6-Rom12:8); [1CO 12:8–12:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:8-1Cor12:11), [1CO 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:28); [EPH 4:11](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11)

---------------------------------

## 7030: unity (id: 7030)

The bringing together of separate or fragmented parts into a unified whole. It is God's ultimate goal to unite the whole of creation; his desire for unity is evident, too, in the life of his people. God himself acts as a unity in all his works.

* **Associated Articles:** 7031: unity, God's goal of (ID: `7031@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7032: unity, of God's people (ID: `7032@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7033: unity, of God (ID: `7033@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 7031: unity, God's goal of (id: 7031)

God's purpose is to bring together and reconcile to himself the whole of creation. This desire for unity is a reflection of the unity within the Godhead; it is expressed in marriage, and demonstrated in the fellowship of the church.

Unity is a reflection of God's person
-------------------------------------

**[DEU 6:4](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4)**; **[JHN 17:22](https://ref.ly/John17:22)** *See also* [MRK 12:29](https://ref.ly/Mark12:29), [MRK 12:32](https://ref.ly/Mark12:32); [JHN 1:1](https://ref.ly/John1:1), [JHN 17:11](https://ref.ly/John17:11); [GAL 3:20](https://ref.ly/Gal3:20); [1JN 5:7](https://ref.ly/1John5:7)

Alienation is a result of sin
-----------------------------

### Alienation from God

[GEN 3:8](https://ref.ly/Gen3:8), [GEN 3:23–3:24](https://ref.ly/Gen3:23-Gen3:24); ; [ISA 59:2](https://ref.ly/Isa59:2); ; [EZK 28:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:16); ; [JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4)

### Alienation from one another

God's purpose in unity
----------------------

### To bring together all peoples

**[PSA 133:1](https://ref.ly/Ps133:1)**; **[EPH 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Eph1:9-Eph1:10)**

### To unite all peoples under his rule

**[ZEC 14:9](https://ref.ly/Zech14:9)** *See also* [GEN 49:10](https://ref.ly/Gen49:10); [PSA 72:8–72:11](https://ref.ly/Ps72:8-Ps72:11); [ISA 2:2–2:4](https://ref.ly/Isa2:2-Isa2:4) parallel [MIC 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Mic4:1-Mic4:3); [JHN 10:16](https://ref.ly/John10:16); [PHP 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:9-Phil2:11); [REV 11:15](https://ref.ly/Rev11:15)

### To unite all peoples in worship

**[ISA 19:23–19:25](https://ref.ly/Isa19:23-Isa19:25)** *See also* [PSA 86:9](https://ref.ly/Ps86:9); [ISA 56:6–56:8](https://ref.ly/Isa56:6-Isa56:8); [ZEC 8:20–8:23](https://ref.ly/Zech8:20-Zech8:23), [ZEC 14:16](https://ref.ly/Zech14:16); [MRK 11:17](https://ref.ly/Mark11:17); [REV 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rev15:4)

### To bring reconciliation between Jew and Gentile

**[EPH 2:11–2:19](https://ref.ly/Eph2:11-Eph2:19)** *See also* [ISA 14:1](https://ref.ly/Isa14:1); [ROM 10:12](https://ref.ly/Rom10:12); [GAL 3:28](https://ref.ly/Gal3:28); [COL 3:11](https://ref.ly/Col3:11)

### To bring reconciliation among his people

**[JER 50:4](https://ref.ly/Jer50:4)** *See also* [ISA 11:10–11:13](https://ref.ly/Isa11:10-Isa11:13); [EZK 37:21–37:24](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:21-Ezek37:24); [MIC 2:12](https://ref.ly/Mic2:12); [MAT 5:24](https://ref.ly/Matt5:24); [PHP 4:2](https://ref.ly/Phil4:2)

### To reconcile humanity to himself

**[COL 1:19–1:22](https://ref.ly/Col1:19-Col1:22)** *See also* [ROM 5:10–5:11](https://ref.ly/Rom5:10-Rom5:11); [2CO 5:18–5:19](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:18-2Cor5:19); [HEB 10:19–10:20](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:20)

## 7032: unity, of God's people (id: 7032)

A distinguishing characteristic of God's people, which derives from their common relationship with God, and is expressed in commitment to one another, mutual concern, concerted action and harmony within the believing community.

Unity in a common relationship with God
---------------------------------------

### As children of God

**[MAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Mal2:10)** *See also* [PSA 133:1](https://ref.ly/Ps133:1); [MAT 23:8–23:9](https://ref.ly/Matt23:8-Matt23:9); [ROM 8:15–8:17](https://ref.ly/Rom8:15-Rom8:17); [COL 1:2](https://ref.ly/Col1:2), [COL 1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:12); [1JN 5:1](https://ref.ly/1John5:1)

### As the people of God

**[1PE 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9-1Pet2:10)** *See also* [EXO 6:7](https://ref.ly/Exod6:7), [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6); [DEU 7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:6); [2SA 7:24](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:24) parallel [1CH 17:22](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:22); [MAL 3:17](https://ref.ly/Mal3:17); [EPH 1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:14); [HEB 11:25](https://ref.ly/Heb11:25)

Unity in a common union with Christ
-----------------------------------

**[1CO 10:16–10:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:16-1Cor10:17), [1CO 12:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:27)** *See also* [JHN 11:52](https://ref.ly/John11:52); [ROM 12:4–12:5](https://ref.ly/Rom12:4-Rom12:5); [1CO 12:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:12); [GAL 3:26–3:28](https://ref.ly/Gal3:26-Gal3:28); [EPH 2:17–2:19](https://ref.ly/Eph2:17-Eph2:19), [EPH 4:16](https://ref.ly/Eph4:16); [COL 3:11](https://ref.ly/Col3:11)

-------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 12:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:13)** *See also* [ISA 34:16](https://ref.ly/Isa34:16); [ACT 10:45–10:47](https://ref.ly/Acts10:45-Acts10:47); [1CO 12:4–12:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:4-1Cor12:11); [2CO 13:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:14); [EPH 2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:22); [HEB 6:4](https://ref.ly/Heb6:4)

-----------------------

---------------------------------------

### Commitment to one another

### Sharing possessions

**[ACT 4:32](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32)** *See also* [LUK 3:11](https://ref.ly/Luke3:11); [ACT 2:44–2:45](https://ref.ly/Acts2:44-Acts2:45); [ROM 12:13](https://ref.ly/Rom12:13), [ROM 15:27](https://ref.ly/Rom15:27); [GAL 6:6](https://ref.ly/Gal6:6); [2TI 2:6](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:6)

### Giving support

### Sharing troubles

Unity expressed in agreement with one another
---------------------------------------------

### Living in harmony

**[PSA 133:1](https://ref.ly/Ps133:1)**; **[EPH 4:3](https://ref.ly/Eph4:3)**; **[1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8)** *See also* [ROM 12:16](https://ref.ly/Rom12:16), [ROM 14:17](https://ref.ly/Rom14:17); [1CO 10:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:24); [EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25); [PHP 4:2](https://ref.ly/Phil4:2); [COL 1:12–1:14](https://ref.ly/Col1:12-Col1:14), [COL 3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:15)

### United in purpose

**[PHP 1:27](https://ref.ly/Phil1:27)** *See also* [JDG 20:11](https://ref.ly/Judg20:11); [1SA 14:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:7); [EZR 3:8–3:10](https://ref.ly/Ezra3:8-Ezra3:10); [NEH 4:6](https://ref.ly/Neh4:6); [MAT 18:19–18:20](https://ref.ly/Matt18:19-Matt18:20)

### Of one mind

**[1CO 1:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:10)** *See also* [2CH 30:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:12); [PHP 2:2](https://ref.ly/Phil2:2)

Unity expressed in worshipping together
---------------------------------------

**[ROM 15:5–15:6](https://ref.ly/Rom15:5-Rom15:6)** *See also* [PSA 22:22](https://ref.ly/Ps22:22), [PSA 68:26](https://ref.ly/Ps68:26), [PSA 122:1](https://ref.ly/Ps122:1); [1CO 14:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:26); [HEB 2:12](https://ref.ly/Heb2:12)

Unity marks out God's people
----------------------------

**[JHN 17:21–17:23](https://ref.ly/John17:21-John17:23)** *See also* [JHN 13:34–13:35](https://ref.ly/John13:34-John13:35)

* **Associated Passages:** Malachi 2:10; Psalms 133:1; Matthew 23:8-9; Romans 8:15-17; Colossians 1:2; Colossians 1:12; 1 John 5:1; 1 Peter 2:9-10; Exodus 6:7; Exodus 19:5-6; Deuteronomy 7:6; 2 Samuel 7:24; 1 Chronicles 17:22; Malachi 3:17; Ephesians 1:14; Hebrews 11:25; 1 Corinthians 10:16-17; 1 Corinthians 12:27; John 11:52; Romans 12:4-5; 1 Corinthians 12:12; Galatians 3:26-28; Ephesians 2:17-19; Ephesians 4:16; Colossians 3:11; 1 Corinthians 12:13; Isaiah 34:16; Acts 10:45-47; 1 Corinthians 12:4-11; 2 Corinthians 13:14; Ephesians 2:22; Hebrews 6:4; Ephesians 4:4-6; Ephesians 4:13; Titus 1:4; 1 John 1:1-3; Jude 1:3; 1 Samuel 18:1-4; Ruth 1:16-17; 1 Thessalonians 2:8; Acts 4:32; Luke 3:11; Acts 2:44-45; Romans 12:13; Romans 15:27; Galatians 6:6; 2 Timothy 2:6; Joshua 22:3; Deuteronomy 3:18; Hebrews 10:24-25; 2 Corinthians 1:7; Philippians 4:14; Ephesians 4:3; 1 Peter 3:8; Romans 12:16; Romans 14:17; 1 Corinthians 10:24; Ephesians 4:25; Philippians 4:2; Colossians 1:12-14; Colossians 3:15; Philippians 1:27; Judges 20:11; 1 Samuel 14:7; Ezra 3:8-10; Nehemiah 4:6; Matthew 18:19-20; 1 Corinthians 1:10; 2 Chronicles 30:12; Philippians 2:2; Romans 15:5-6; Psalms 22:22; Psalms 68:26; Psalms 122:1; 1 Corinthians 14:26; Hebrews 2:12; John 17:21-23; John 13:34-35

## 7105: believers (id: 7105)

Those who have faith in God. After Pentecost, the term came to be used specifically to refer to Christians, that is, to those who believe and trust in God, as he has made himself known through Jesus Christ. The NT stresses that Jesus Christ brings the faith of OT believers to perfection and to its proper fulfilment.

Believers as those who have faith in God
----------------------------------------

**[1KI 18:3–18:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:3-1Kgs18:4)** *See also* [JHN 4:39–4:42](https://ref.ly/John4:39-John4:42); [ACT 16:15](https://ref.ly/Acts16:15); [JAS 2:1](https://ref.ly/Jas2:1)

OT believers looked forward to the NT faith
-------------------------------------------

**[HEB 11:13](https://ref.ly/Heb11:13)** *See also* [HEB 11:39](https://ref.ly/Heb11:39); [1PE 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:10-1Pet1:12)

The church is referred to as the believers
------------------------------------------

**[ACT 5:12](https://ref.ly/Acts5:12)** *See also* [ACT 1:15](https://ref.ly/Acts1:15), [ACT 2:44](https://ref.ly/Acts2:44), [ACT 4:32](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32), [ACT 9:41](https://ref.ly/Acts9:41); [1TI 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:12)

In the early church a distinction was sometimes made between Jewish and Gentile believers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 15:23](https://ref.ly/Acts15:23)** *See also* [ACT 10:45](https://ref.ly/Acts10:45), [ACT 11:1–11:3](https://ref.ly/Acts11:1-Acts11:3), [ACT 15:5](https://ref.ly/Acts15:5), [ACT 21:20–21:25](https://ref.ly/Acts21:20-Acts21:25)

The term believer is synonymous with Christian
----------------------------------------------

**[1CO 7:12–7:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:12-1Cor7:13)** *See also* [ACT 15:2](https://ref.ly/Acts15:2), [ACT 16:1](https://ref.ly/Acts16:1); [1CO 6:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:5), [1CO 14:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:22); [2CO 6:14–6:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:14-2Cor6:15); [1TH 1:7](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:7); [1TI 5:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:16)

Believers are members of God's family
-------------------------------------

**[GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10)** *See also* [1TI 6:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:2); [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Kings 18:3-4; John 4:39-42; Acts 16:15; James 2:1; Hebrews 11:13; Hebrews 11:39; 1 Peter 1:10-12; Acts 5:12; Acts 1:15; Acts 2:44; Acts 4:32; Acts 9:41; 1 Timothy 4:12; Acts 15:23; Acts 10:45; Acts 11:1-3; Acts 15:5; Acts 21:20-25; 1 Corinthians 7:12-13; Acts 15:2; Acts 16:1; 1 Corinthians 6:5; 1 Corinthians 14:22; 2 Corinthians 6:14-15; 1 Thessalonians 1:7; 1 Timothy 5:16; Galatians 6:10; 1 Timothy 6:2; 1 Peter 2:17
* **Associated Articles:** 4019: life, believers' experience of (ID: `4019@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5078: Abraham, significance of (ID: `5078@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6257: unbelievers (ID: `6257@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6610: adoption, descriptions of (ID: `6610@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6705: peace, believers' experience of (ID: `6705@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7020: church, the (ID: `7020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7120: Christians (ID: `7120@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7155: saints (ID: `7155@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7512: Gentiles, in NT (ID: `7512@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7620: disciples (ID: `7620@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9315: resurrection, of believers (ID: `9315@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 7110: body of Christ (id: 7110)

The term refers both to the physical body of Jesus Christ, which was broken on the cross in order that redemption might be accomplished through him, and to the church.

Jesus Christ's physical body
----------------------------

### His birth

**[JHN 1:14](https://ref.ly/John1:14)** *See also* [ROM 1:3](https://ref.ly/Rom1:3); [GAL 4:4](https://ref.ly/Gal4:4); [1TI 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:16)

### His bodily needs

[MAT 8:24](https://ref.ly/Matt8:24) parallels [MRK 4:38](https://ref.ly/Mark4:38), [LUK 8:23](https://ref.ly/Luke8:23); ; [MRK 11:12](https://ref.ly/Mark11:12) parallel [MAT 21:18](https://ref.ly/Matt21:18); ; [LUK 4:2](https://ref.ly/Luke4:2) parallel [MAT 4:2](https://ref.ly/Matt4:2); ; [JHN 4:6](https://ref.ly/John4:6), [JHN 19:28](https://ref.ly/John19:28)

His physical suffering
----------------------

**[MAT 27:26](https://ref.ly/Matt27:26)** parallels [MRK 15:15](https://ref.ly/Mark15:15), [JHN 19:1](https://ref.ly/John19:1) *See also* [MAT 27:28–27:30](https://ref.ly/Matt27:28-Matt27:30) parallels [MRK 15:17–15:19](https://ref.ly/Mark15:17-Mark15:19), [JHN 19:2–19:3](https://ref.ly/John19:2-John19:3); [LUK 22:44](https://ref.ly/Luke22:44)

### His real physical death

**[JHN 19:31–19:37](https://ref.ly/John19:31-John19:37)** *See also* [MAT 27:35](https://ref.ly/Matt27:35) parallels [MRK 15:24–15:25](https://ref.ly/Mark15:24-Mark15:25), [LUK 23:33](https://ref.ly/Luke23:33), [JHN 19:23](https://ref.ly/John19:23); [ACT 2:23](https://ref.ly/Acts2:23)

### His burial

**[MRK 15:43–15:46](https://ref.ly/Mark15:43-Mark15:46)** parallels [MAT 27:58–27:60](https://ref.ly/Matt27:58-Matt27:60), [LUK 23:52–23:53](https://ref.ly/Luke23:52-Luke23:53), [JHN 19:38–19:42](https://ref.ly/John19:38-John19:42)

### His physical resurrection

**[LUK 24:37–24:43](https://ref.ly/Luke24:37-Luke24:43)** *See also* [MAT 28:9](https://ref.ly/Matt28:9); [JHN 20:19–20:20](https://ref.ly/John20:19-John20:20), [JHN 20:27](https://ref.ly/John20:27)

The body of Christ symbolised in the Lord's Supper
--------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 26:26](https://ref.ly/Matt26:26)** parallels [MRK 14:22](https://ref.ly/Mark14:22), [LUK 22:19](https://ref.ly/Luke22:19) *See also* [JHN 6:51–6:58](https://ref.ly/John6:51-John6:58); [1CO 10:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:16), [1CO 11:23–11:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:23-1Cor11:30)

The church as the body of Christ
--------------------------------

### Believers as members of the body of Christ

**[1CO 12:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:27)** *See also* [ROM 12:4–12:5](https://ref.ly/Rom12:4-Rom12:5); [1CO 12:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:12); [EPH 4:4](https://ref.ly/Eph4:4); [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24)

### Jesus Christ as the head of the body

**[COL 1:18](https://ref.ly/Col1:18)** *See also* [EPH 1:22](https://ref.ly/Eph1:22), [EPH 5:23](https://ref.ly/Eph5:23)

### Jesus Christ's resurrection body is a new temple

**[JHN 2:19–2:22](https://ref.ly/John2:19-John2:22)** *See also* [EPH 2:19–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19-Eph2:22)

Life in the body of Christ
--------------------------

### Baptism is into the body of Christ

**[1CO 12:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:13)** *See also* [GAL 3:27](https://ref.ly/Gal3:27)

### Believers receive spiritual life through the body of Christ

**[COL 2:19](https://ref.ly/Col2:19)** *See also* [1CO 10:16–10:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:16-1Cor10:17); [EPH 4:15–4:16](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15-Eph4:16)

### Believers care for each other in the body of Christ

**[1CO 12:25–12:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:25-1Cor12:26)** *See also* [EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25), [EPH 5:29–5:30](https://ref.ly/Eph5:29-Eph5:30); [COL 3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:15)

### Believers have different gifts in the body of Christ

**[ROM 12:4–12:5](https://ref.ly/Rom12:4-Rom12:5)** *See also* [ROM 12:6–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6-Rom12:8); [1CO 12:12–12:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:12-1Cor12:31); [EPH 4:11–4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:13)

* **Associated Passages:** John 1:14; Romans 1:3; Galatians 4:4; 1 Timothy 3:16; Matthew 8:24; Mark 4:38; Luke 8:23; Mark 11:12; Matthew 21:18; Luke 4:2; Matthew 4:2; John 4:6; John 19:28; Matthew 27:26; Mark 15:15; John 19:1; Matthew 27:28-30; Mark 15:17-19; John 19:2-3; Luke 22:44; John 19:31-37; Matthew 27:35; Mark 15:24-25; Luke 23:33; John 19:23; Acts 2:23; Mark 15:43-46; Matthew 27:58-60; Luke 23:52-53; John 19:38-42; Luke 24:37-43; Matthew 28:9; John 20:19-20; John 20:27; Matthew 26:26; Mark 14:22; Luke 22:19; John 6:51-58; 1 Corinthians 10:16; 1 Corinthians 11:23-30; 1 Corinthians 12:27; Romans 12:4-5; 1 Corinthians 12:12; Ephesians 4:4; Colossians 1:24; Colossians 1:18; Ephesians 1:22; Ephesians 5:23; John 2:19-22; Ephesians 2:19-22; 1 Corinthians 12:13; Galatians 3:27; Colossians 2:19; 1 Corinthians 10:16-17; Ephesians 4:15-16; 1 Corinthians 12:25-26; Ephesians 4:25; Ephesians 5:29-30; Colossians 3:15; Romans 12:6-8; 1 Corinthians 12:12-31; Ephesians 4:11-13
* **Associated Articles:** 2212: Jesus Christ, head of the church (ID: `2212@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2530: Jesus Christ, death of (ID: `2530@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2560: Jesus Christ, resurrection of (ID: `2560@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3275: Holy Spirit, in the church (ID: `3275@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6754: union with Christ (ID: `6754@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7020: church, the (ID: `7020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7105: believers (ID: `7105@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7921: fellowship (ID: `7921@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7933: Lord's Supper (ID: `7933@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7957: sacraments (ID: `7957@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7966: spiritual gifts (ID: `7966@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8347: spiritual growth (ID: `8347@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 7115: children of God (id: 7115)

Israel and the church are the chief objects of God's fatherly love. People become God's children through faith and are then encouraged by Scripture to imitate their heavenly Father in their daily living.

Human beings as God's children
------------------------------

[GEN 1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:27), [GEN 6:2](https://ref.ly/Gen6:2), [GEN 6:4](https://ref.ly/Gen6:4); ; [PSA 82:6](https://ref.ly/Ps82:6); ; [MAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Mal2:10); ; [LUK 3:38](https://ref.ly/Luke3:38); ; [EPH 3:14](https://ref.ly/Eph3:14)

Israel as God's children
------------------------

**[HOS 11:1](https://ref.ly/Hos11:1)** *See also* [EXO 4:22–4:23](https://ref.ly/Exod4:22-Exod4:23); [PSA 73:15](https://ref.ly/Ps73:15), [PSA 80:15](https://ref.ly/Ps80:15); [ISA 43:6](https://ref.ly/Isa43:6), [ISA 63:16](https://ref.ly/Isa63:16); [JER 31:20](https://ref.ly/Jer31:20); [ROM 9:4](https://ref.ly/Rom9:4)

### Israel as God's rebellious children

**[ISA 1:2](https://ref.ly/Isa1:2)** *See also* [DEU 32:5](https://ref.ly/Deut32:5), [DEU 32:20](https://ref.ly/Deut32:20); [ISA 30:1](https://ref.ly/Isa30:1), [ISA 30:9](https://ref.ly/Isa30:9); [JER 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Jer3:4-Jer3:5), [JER 4:22](https://ref.ly/Jer4:22); [EZK 20:21](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:21)

God's son
---------

### Promises of God's son

**[2SA 7:12–7:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:12-2Sam7:14)** parallel [1CH 17:11–17:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:11-1Chr17:13) *These words referred originally to David's son, Solomon, but in the NT they are applied to Jesus Christ.* *See also* [1CH 22:10](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:10), [1CH 28:6](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:6); [PSA 2:7](https://ref.ly/Ps2:7), [PSA 89:26–89:27](https://ref.ly/Ps89:26-Ps89:27)

### Jesus Christ as God's son

**[HEB 1:5](https://ref.ly/Heb1:5)** *See also* [MAT 3:17](https://ref.ly/Matt3:17) parallels [MRK 1:11](https://ref.ly/Mark1:11), [LUK 3:22](https://ref.ly/Luke3:22); [LUK 1:32](https://ref.ly/Luke1:32); [ACT 13:33](https://ref.ly/Acts13:33); [ROM 1:4](https://ref.ly/Rom1:4)

Jesus Christ's followers as God's children
------------------------------------------

[MAT 9:2](https://ref.ly/Matt9:2) parallel [MRK 2:5](https://ref.ly/Mark2:5); ; [MAT 9:22](https://ref.ly/Matt9:22) parallels [MRK 5:34](https://ref.ly/Mark5:34), [LUK 8:48](https://ref.ly/Luke8:48)

Becoming God's children through faith in Jesus Christ
-----------------------------------------------------

### Becoming God's children by new birth

**[JHN 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/John1:12-John1:13)** *See also* [JHN 12:36](https://ref.ly/John12:36); [ROM 9:8](https://ref.ly/Rom9:8); [GAL 3:26](https://ref.ly/Gal3:26); [1JN 5:1](https://ref.ly/1John5:1)

### Becoming God's children by adoption

**[EPH 1:5](https://ref.ly/Eph1:5)** *See also* [ROM 8:23](https://ref.ly/Rom8:23) *This adoption will be fully realised in the future*; [GAL 4:4–4:5](https://ref.ly/Gal4:4-Gal4:5)

### Becoming God's children by the Spirit

**[ROM 8:15](https://ref.ly/Rom8:15)** *See also* [GAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:6)

God's dealings with his children
--------------------------------

### God loves his children

**[1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)** *See also* [DEU 1:31](https://ref.ly/Deut1:31); [PSA 103:13](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13); [EPH 5:1](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1)

### God disciplines his children

**[DEU 8:5](https://ref.ly/Deut8:5)** *See also* [PRO 3:11–3:12](https://ref.ly/Prov3:11-Prov3:12); [HEB 12:5–12:10](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5-Heb12:10)

### God does not abandon his children

**[HOS 1:10](https://ref.ly/Hos1:10)** *God had previously ([Hos 1:9](https://ref.ly/Hos1:9)) announced his judgment that Israel would be his people no longer.* *See also* [DEU 31:6](https://ref.ly/Deut31:6), [DEU 31:8](https://ref.ly/Deut31:8); [JOS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Josh1:5); [HEB 13:5](https://ref.ly/Heb13:5); [JER 31:9](https://ref.ly/Jer31:9); [MAL 3:17](https://ref.ly/Mal3:17); [LUK 15:24](https://ref.ly/Luke15:24); [ROM 9:26](https://ref.ly/Rom9:26)

Behaviour expected of God's children
------------------------------------

### God's children imitate their heavenly Father

**[EPH 5:1](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1)** *See also* [MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48); [LUK 6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:36)

### God's children live by the Father's standards

**[PHP 2:15](https://ref.ly/Phil2:15)** *See also* [LEV 11:44–11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44-Lev11:45); [DEU 14:1–14:2](https://ref.ly/Deut14:1-Deut14:2); [MAT 5:9](https://ref.ly/Matt5:9), [MAT 5:44–5:45](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44-Matt5:45) parallel [LUK 6:35–6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35-Luke6:36); [ROM 8:14](https://ref.ly/Rom8:14); [2CO 6:17–6:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:17-2Cor6:18); [1PE 1:14–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14-1Pet1:16); [1JN 3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:10)

The privileges and blessings of being God's children
----------------------------------------------------

### God's children are eternally secure

**[JHN 8:35](https://ref.ly/John8:35)** *See also* [ROM 8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:16), [ROM 8:21](https://ref.ly/Rom8:21); [1JN 5:19](https://ref.ly/1John5:19)

### The needs of God's children are always supplied

**[MAT 7:9–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:9-Matt7:11)** parallel [LUK 11:11–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:11-Luke11:13) *See also* [MAT 6:25–6:32](https://ref.ly/Matt6:25-Matt6:32) parallel [LUK 12:22–12:30](https://ref.ly/Luke12:22-Luke12:30) *needs for the present life*; [LUK 20:36](https://ref.ly/Luke20:36); [ROM 8:23](https://ref.ly/Rom8:23) *promises for the life to come*

### God's children have a sure inheritance

**[REV 21:7](https://ref.ly/Rev21:7)** *See also* [JER 3:19](https://ref.ly/Jer3:19); [ROM 8:17–8:19](https://ref.ly/Rom8:17-Rom8:19); [GAL 4:7](https://ref.ly/Gal4:7); [1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 1:27; Genesis 6:2; Genesis 6:4; Psalms 82:6; Malachi 2:10; Luke 3:38; Ephesians 3:14; Hosea 11:1; Exodus 4:22-23; Psalms 73:15; Psalms 80:15; Isaiah 43:6; Isaiah 63:16; Jeremiah 31:20; Romans 9:4; Isaiah 1:2; Deuteronomy 32:5; Deuteronomy 32:20; Isaiah 30:1; Isaiah 30:9; Jeremiah 3:4-5; Jeremiah 4:22; Ezekiel 20:21; 2 Samuel 7:12-14; 1 Chronicles 17:11-13; 1 Chronicles 22:10; 1 Chronicles 28:6; Psalms 2:7; Psalms 89:26-27; Hebrews 1:5; Matthew 3:17; Mark 1:11; Luke 3:22; Luke 1:32; Acts 13:33; Romans 1:4; Matthew 9:2; Mark 2:5; Matthew 9:22; Mark 5:34; Luke 8:48; John 1:12-13; John 12:36; Romans 9:8; Galatians 3:26; 1 John 5:1; Ephesians 1:5; Romans 8:23; Galatians 4:4-5; Romans 8:15; Galatians 4:6; 1 John 3:1; Deuteronomy 1:31; Psalms 103:13; Ephesians 5:1; Deuteronomy 8:5; Proverbs 3:11-12; Hebrews 12:5-10; Hosea 1:10; Hosea 1:9; Deuteronomy 31:6; Deuteronomy 31:8; Joshua 1:5; Hebrews 13:5; Jeremiah 31:9; Malachi 3:17; Luke 15:24; Romans 9:26; Matthew 5:48; Luke 6:36; Philippians 2:15; Leviticus 11:44-45; Deuteronomy 14:1-2; Matthew 5:9; Matthew 5:44-45; Luke 6:35-36; Romans 8:14; 2 Corinthians 6:17-18; 1 Peter 1:14-16; 1 John 3:10; John 8:35; Romans 8:16; Romans 8:21; 1 John 5:19; Matthew 7:9-11; Luke 11:11-13; Matthew 6:25-32; Luke 12:22-30; Luke 20:36; Revelation 21:7; Romans 8:17-19; Galatians 4:7; 1 John 3:2

## 7120: Christians (id: 7120)

Those who belong to Jesus Christ; other designations in Scripture are believers, disciples and the children of God. Originally a nickname, the term is only used three times in the Bible.

The use of the term
-------------------

### Disciples first called Christians

**[ACT 11:26](https://ref.ly/Acts11:26)**

### Agrippa not persuaded

**[ACT 26:28](https://ref.ly/Acts26:28)**

### Suffering as a Christian

**[1PE 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:16)**

Other biblical designations of Christians
-----------------------------------------

### Christians described as believers

**[ACT 2:44](https://ref.ly/Acts2:44)** *See also* [ACT 4:32](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32), [ACT 5:12](https://ref.ly/Acts5:12); [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [JAS 2:1](https://ref.ly/Jas2:1); [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17)

### Christians described as brothers

**[HEB 2:11](https://ref.ly/Heb2:11)** *See also* [ACT 15:3](https://ref.ly/Acts15:3); [COL 1:2](https://ref.ly/Col1:2); [2TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13); [REV 19:10](https://ref.ly/Rev19:10)

### Christians described as disciples

**[MAT 28:19](https://ref.ly/Matt28:19)** *See also* [ACT 6:1](https://ref.ly/Acts6:1), [ACT 6:7](https://ref.ly/Acts6:7), [ACT 13:52](https://ref.ly/Acts13:52), [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22)

### Christians described as children of God

**[1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)** *See also* [JHN 1:12](https://ref.ly/John1:12); [ROM 8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:16), [ROM 8:21](https://ref.ly/Rom8:21); [GAL 3:26–4:7](https://ref.ly/Gal3:26-Gal4:7)

### Christians described as the church

**[ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5)** *See also* [ACT 5:11](https://ref.ly/Acts5:11), [ACT 8:1](https://ref.ly/Acts8:1), [ACT 15:3](https://ref.ly/Acts15:3); [ROM 16:5](https://ref.ly/Rom16:5); [2CO 1:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:1); [COL 1:18](https://ref.ly/Col1:18), [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24); [1TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:15)

### Christians described as the elect

**[1PE 1:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:1)** *See also* [MAT 24:22](https://ref.ly/Matt24:22); [ROM 11:7](https://ref.ly/Rom11:7); [2TI 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:10); [TIT 1:1](https://ref.ly/Titus1:1)

### Christians described as heirs of God

**[ROM 8:17](https://ref.ly/Rom8:17)** *See also* [GAL 3:29](https://ref.ly/Gal3:29), [GAL 4:7](https://ref.ly/Gal4:7); [EPH 3:6](https://ref.ly/Eph3:6); [1PE 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:7)

### Christians described as members of God's household

**[EPH 2:19](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19)** *See also* [1TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:15)

### Christians described as the people of God

**[1PE 2:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:10)** *See also* [EPH 2:19](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [REV 21:3](https://ref.ly/Rev21:3)

### Christians described as saints

**[ROM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Rom1:7)** *See also* [ROM 15:25](https://ref.ly/Rom15:25); [1CO 6:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:2); [2CO 1:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:1), [2CO 13:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:13); [EPH 1:15](https://ref.ly/Eph1:15), [EPH 1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18); [1TI 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:10); [JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)

* **Associated Passages:** Acts 11:26; Acts 26:28; 1 Peter 4:16; Acts 2:44; Acts 4:32; Acts 5:12; Galatians 6:10; James 2:1; 1 Peter 2:17; Hebrews 2:11; Acts 15:3; Colossians 1:2; 2 Thessalonians 2:13; Revelation 19:10; Matthew 28:19; Acts 6:1; Acts 6:7; Acts 13:52; Acts 14:22; 1 John 3:1; John 1:12; Romans 8:16; Romans 8:21; Galatians 3:26-4:7; Acts 12:5; Acts 5:11; Acts 8:1; Romans 16:5; 2 Corinthians 1:1; Colossians 1:18; Colossians 1:24; 1 Timothy 3:15; 1 Peter 1:1; Matthew 24:22; Romans 11:7; 2 Timothy 2:10; Titus 1:1; Romans 8:17; Galatians 3:29; Galatians 4:7; Ephesians 3:6; 1 Peter 3:7; Ephesians 2:19; 1 Peter 2:10; Colossians 3:12; Revelation 21:3; Romans 1:7; Romans 15:25; 1 Corinthians 6:2; 2 Corinthians 13:13; Ephesians 1:15; Ephesians 1:18; 1 Timothy 5:10; Jude 1:3
